# Last Time

::: {.incremental}
+ **Introduction to Arrays** — declaration, initialization, stack allocation
+ **Accessing Elements** — subscript operator; index-based for vs. range-for
+ **Inputting and Displaying** — two-pass fill/display pattern
+ **Vectors vs. Arrays** — fixed size, no bounds check, zero overhead
:::

::: notes
Brief recall: students declared and initialized arrays, looped over them with both for styles, and saw the structural contrast with vectors.
:::

---

# Today's Agenda

- Processing Array Contents (sum, min, max)
- Linear Search
- Sorting — Bubble Sort
- sizeof with Arrays
- typedef
- Arrays as Function Arguments

::: notes

:::

{{< include topic_1_array_processing.qmd >}}
{{< include topic_2_linear_search.qmd >}}
{{< include topic_3_bubble_sort.qmd >}}
{{< include topic_4_sizeof_arrays.qmd >}}
{{< include topic_5_typedef.qmd >}}
{{< include topic_6_arrays_functions.qmd >}}

---

# Key Takeaways

- Accumulator and tracker patterns from loop work apply directly to arrays — same logic, indexed access
- Linear search returns `-1` for "not found"; bubble sort requires a `temp` variable to swap safely
- `sizeof(array) / sizeof(array[0])` gives element count only where the array is declared — not inside functions
- Arrays decay to pointers when passed to functions; always pass size separately and use `const` for read-only parameters

---

# Next Time

---

# Appendix

---

## Processing Array Contents: Good Practices

---

## Processing Array Contents: Common Mistakes

---

## Processing Array Contents: More Examples

---

## Processing Array Contents: Practice Problems

---

## Processing Array Contents: AI Search Terms

---

## Processing Array Contents: Questions for Reflection

---

## Linear Search: Good Practices

---

## Linear Search: Common Mistakes

---

## Linear Search: More Examples

---

## Linear Search: Practice Problems

---

## Linear Search: AI Search Terms

---

## Linear Search: Questions for Reflection

---

## Sorting — Bubble Sort: Good Practices

---

## Sorting — Bubble Sort: Common Mistakes

---

## Sorting — Bubble Sort: More Examples

---

## Sorting — Bubble Sort: Practice Problems

---

## Sorting — Bubble Sort: AI Search Terms

---

## Sorting — Bubble Sort: Questions for Reflection

---

## sizeof with Arrays: Good Practices

---

## sizeof with Arrays: Common Mistakes

---

## sizeof with Arrays: More Examples

---

## sizeof with Arrays: Practice Problems

---

## sizeof with Arrays: AI Search Terms

---

## sizeof with Arrays: Questions for Reflection

---

## typedef: Good Practices

---

## typedef: Common Mistakes

---

## typedef: More Examples

---

## typedef: Practice Problems

---

## typedef: AI Search Terms

---

## typedef: Questions for Reflection

---

## Arrays as Function Arguments: Good Practices

---

## Arrays as Function Arguments: Common Mistakes

---

## Arrays as Function Arguments: More Examples

---

## Arrays as Function Arguments: Practice Problems

---

## Arrays as Function Arguments: AI Search Terms

---

## Arrays as Function Arguments: Questions for Reflection
